sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107466" key="u(perentugxa/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερεν-τυγχάνω</orth>, <sense id="n107466.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">intercede,</tr_> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπέρ τινος</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for</tr_> one, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:8:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
